data.text: PLANET DISCOVERED BY MCWGOGS 6011.639.768. FELYSIAN, COMMON LIFE
(THIS PLANET HAS TRANSPARENT GRASS!!!) HOPPERS AND BIRDS ARENT.
TRANSPARENT GRASS IS NOT EVERYWHERE. IF IT ISN'T THER ARE
TRANSPARENT TREES. I DIDN'T FOUND A PLACE WITH TRANSPARENT TREES
AND GRASS. BARREN AREAS ARE ALSO TRANSPARENT.
